message:
feat: expand runtime blocking, IO driver, and lifecycle APIs with test coverage (+179 lines)

Extend blocking.h/c with pool sizing and drain APIs, io_driver.h/c with
event subscription configuration, and rt.h/c with lifecycle checkpoint
hooks. Add 64 lines of runtime unit tests covering the new APIs. Sync
beads tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
